queue_row.single_writer_rule: Codex/local is the only writer to repository files. ChatGPT is read-only for repository files unless Scott explicitly says: "write directly to GitHub."

findings.description: Queue-specified command python tools/validate_registry.py was missing.
findings.evidence: Canonical control-plane validation expected python tools/validate_registry.py but the repo had no tools/validate_registry.py file before this run.
findings.impact: Control-plane readiness validation could not replay literally on this repo.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep tools/validate_registry.py wired into CI while queue validation expects it.

findings.description: The repo previously exposed only a synthetic sample rather than a real reusable content record.
findings.evidence: Added content/operator-handoff-template.md and updated contracts/examples/manifest.yaml plus contracts/examples/artifact.yaml to point at a real reusable handoff template record with replayable validation evidence.
findings.impact: Repo now has non-vacuous readiness evidence for safe downstream content reuse.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep future records tied to real reusable content paths and replayable validation commands.

validations.validates: schema validity, required files, example manifest coverage, and content path/check presence
PowerShell wrapper plus local bootstrap path
